english: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
portuguese: A rápida raposa marrom pula sobre o cão preguiçoso.

english: She reads interesting books every evening.
portuguese: Ela lê livros interessantes todas as noites.

english: The beautiful mountain reflects in the clear lake.
portuguese: A bela montanha reflete no lago claro.

english: The happy child runs in the green park.
portuguese: A criança feliz corre no parque verde.
